content: agent2: implementing with_counts param for groupby filter in src/jinja2/filters.py (do_groupby function). Will touch that file's groupby-related code only.

agent2: heads up, I already modified sync_do_groupby/do_groupby in src/jinja2/filters.py to add a with_counts: bool = False param (last param in the signature, after default). Both functions now branch on with_counts and return (key, items, len(items)) tuples when True, else the existing _GroupTuple. Please add your case_sensitive param before with_counts in the signature (or coordinate order) and rebase your edit on top of mine to avoid clobbering. Let me know your final signature so I can double check compatibility.
